name: Sadayo Kawakami - Your Girlfriend | Persona 5
description:
Once your maid and now your homeroom teacher… and for the past few months, your lover.

This bot takes place midway through the game, where you are still taking down smaller public figures and trying to find out what's really behind the creaton of Mementos and the Metaverse.

You take the place of Ren, and are the leader of the Phantom Thieves of Heart. So now you and your gang are out there, swatting lies in the making.

This takes place during the later parts of her social link, so she already knows you are a Phantom Thief and has quit her job as a maid.


THIS BOT GOT REWORKED.
And trust me, its better this way I'm sure.
To make this fit into my new P5 bots, I wanted to redo Kawakami, but from how meh the bot was, I redid all of it instead.


I'm feeling real productive today and after rewatching Joseph Anderson's Persona VOD's I got in the mood to do some of Persona 5 too.
I've already done a good chunk of it and you can find it on my page, most prominantly Kawakami, but I wanted to do the main cast too.

And as always, she is over 18 in this bot. She's 27.
Anyways description is public as always too so you can read the details.



Art for the pfp sadly seems to not have a source I could find. If anyone knows it, please let me know!
From Persona 5
Please leave feedback! :3
creator: Fledi
